case_title: LUC MONROY ET AL VS. FLORA WU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY DEFENDANT WU, FLORA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY MONROY, LUC BEDOLLA, HECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WU, FLORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED FEB-02-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WU, FLORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2023 BY GARRETT L. WONG. PLAINTIFF LUC MONROY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HECTOR BEDOLLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FLORA WU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN. OTHER APPEARANCES: DEFENDANT HAS (3) WITNESSES, ERWIN SUTO ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNE CHAN, JEREMY RELPH, YING LI ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER WINNE CHAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT WONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO APR-28-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUC MONROY IS PRESENT. HECTOR BEDOLLA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FLORA WU IS NOT PRESENT DURING TAKING ATTENDANCE BUT SHOWED UP WITH WITNESS AFTER AND INFORMED OF THE CONTINANCE DATE. DEFENDANT REQUESTS CHINESE INTERPRETER (CANTONESE PREFERRED) FOR HER WITNESS. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONROY, LUC BEDOLLA, HECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WU, FLORA LEASE AGREEMENT EXECUTED BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PROVIDES FOR 30 DAY NOTICE AND FORFEITURE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT FOR EARLY TERMINATION OF ONE YEAR TERM. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO UNDERSTAND LEASE AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW SUFFICIENT OR CREDIBLE EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF HARASSMENT CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-20-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(LUC MONROY)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2023 - JUDGMENT.
